evals.name: Staging Deployment Setup
evals.description: Test that the skill guides setting up a complete staging deployment pipeline for a Next.js app using CDK
evals.prompt: I have a Next.js 14 app using the App Router. I need to deploy it to AWS using CDK. Set up the infrastructure for a staging environment with S3 for static assets, CloudFront for CDN, and Lambda for SSR. Include environment-specific configuration for the staging API URL (https://api.staging.myapp.com) and show me how to build and deploy.

assertions.description: Includes CDK stack definition with S3 bucket construct
assertions.expected: Output contains an S3 bucket construct in the CDK stack (e.g., new s3.Bucket or aws-s3)
Output contains a CloudFront distribution construct (e.g., new cloudfront.Distribution or aws-cloudfront)
Output contains a Lambda function construct for server-side rendering

assertions.description: Environment-specific configuration with staging API URL
assertions.expected: Output includes environment configuration with the staging API URL (https://api.staging.myapp.com)
Output includes a build step (npm run build or next build) before CDK deployment
Output includes cdk synth command with staging environment context
Output includes cdk deploy command targeting the staging stack

assertions.description: Uses standalone output mode for Next.js
assertions.expected: Output mentions or configures output: 'standalone' in next.config.js for Lambda deployment

evals.name: Production Deployment with Approval Gate
evals.description: Test that the skill enforces a manual approval gate between staging and production deployments
evals.prompt: I've deployed my Next.js app to staging and it looks good. Now I want to deploy to production. Walk me through the production deployment process including any approval steps, the actual deployment, and post-deployment validation. My production domain is app.example.com and the AWS account is 999888777666.

assertions.description: Includes manual approval gate before production deploy
assertions.expected: Output includes a manual approval step or gate that must be completed before production deployment
Output requires staging deployment to be validated/verified before proceeding to production
Output includes cdk deploy command with production environment context

assertions.description: Post-deployment health check or smoke test
assertions.expected: Output includes post-deployment validation such as health checks, smoke tests, or curl commands
Output references the production domain (app.example.com) in the configuration
Output includes running cdk diff before deploying to production to review changes
Output shows production environment configuration separate from staging
Output includes specific criteria or checklist items that must be verified before approving production deployment

evals.name: Rollback Procedures
evals.description: Test that the skill provides comprehensive rollback procedures for different failure scenarios
evals.prompt: My production deployment of the Next.js app just went out and users are reporting 500 errors on some pages. The SSR Lambda seems to be failing. Walk me through how to diagnose the issue and roll back if needed. I need to know my options for different types of failures.

assertions.expected: Output presents at least 2 different rollback strategies (e.g., full CDK rollback, Lambda version rollback, CloudFront rollback)
Output includes a Lambda-specific rollback approach (e.g., updating alias to previous version) since the issue is SSR-related
Output mentions checking CloudWatch logs to diagnose the Lambda/SSR errors
Output includes CloudFormation stack rollback as an option (e.g., aws cloudformation rollback-stack)
Output mentions CloudFront cache invalidation as part of the rollback or recovery process

assertions.description: Decision tree or guidance for choosing rollback strategy
assertions.expected: Output provides guidance on when to use which rollback strategy based on the type of failure
Output includes steps to verify the rollback was successful (e.g., smoke tests, health checks)

assertions.description: Specific AWS CLI commands for rollback
assertions.expected: Output includes specific AWS CLI commands (not just descriptions) for executing the rollback
